headline: TJX, IBD Stock Of The Day, Flashes Bullish Signal Near Buy Point
summary: Off-price retailer TJX could benefit as Iran war disrupts supply chains. TJX stock is near a breakout, topping an early buy point. amid

headline: Does TJX’s Latest Dividend Hike and Buyback Plan Change The Bull Case For TJX Companies (TJX)?
summary: The TJX Companies, Inc. recently announced that its Board of Directors approved a 13% increase in its quarterly dividend to US$0.48 per share, payable on June 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 14, 2026. This marks the 29th dividend increase over 30 years and comes alongside plans for US$2.50–US$2.75 billion in share repurchases for Fiscal 2027, underscoring management’s long-term capital return commitment. Next, we’ll examine how TJX’s higher dividend, alongside its large buyback...
